commands.summary: New-test state polluted old workflow; exact locator correction required
Cold room disclosure locator matched nested option text across seven disclosures

commands.cmd: Mirror server cleanup and port 3100 release

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: Implemented full Pantry management and passing static/service regressions. Browser verification is blocked before the first location edit by an ambiguous test locator; no application mutation failed. Old/new workflows also require separate fresh database preparation.
deviations: Used audited live binaries from mirror cwd because pnpm attempted to purge the node_modules junction.
An accidentally copied .api_keys path and stale tsbuildinfo were removed before build/runtime and the mirror was re-audited clean.
Old and new E2E must run with separate prepare/reset state.
remaining_blockers: Independent fresh-state new and old Pantry browser/axe/screenshots/persistence proof
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.stopped_because: Browser verification failed after two allowed selector-fix attempts.
